simpleFlow.title: Simple flow
simpleFlow.description: Open a group, add expenses, and settle up without getting lost in screens.

clearExpenses.title: Clear expenses
clearExpenses.description: Add amounts, participants, and receipts directly from your phone.

fastBalances.title: Fast balances
fastBalances.description: See who owes whom and record partial payments when needed.

Account.signInDescription: Sign in to view your account and the details linked to your access.
Account.description: Here is the basic information for your NexoGastos account.
Account.profileCardDescription: Review the details you use to access the app and how you appear inside your groups.
Account.accessValue: Your session is linked to Google through Auth0.
Account.accountValue: Your account is already active in the app.
Account.editNameCardDescription: You can change how you appear in the app without changing your Google account.
Account.editNamePlaceholder: Type the name you want to display
Account.editNameDescription: This name will be used in your profile and when linking you to group participants.
Account.profileSavedDescription: Your display name was saved successfully.
Account.actionsDescription: Log out of the current session or remove your local NexoGastos account.
Account.deleteAccountDescription: This removes your local NexoGastos profile, clears saved access, and then logs you out. Your Google/Auth0 account is not deleted.

Expenses.title: Expenses
Expenses.description: Here are the expenses that you created for your group.
Expenses.noExpenses: Your group doesn’t contain any expense yet.

ActiveUserModal.title: Who are you?
ActiveUserModal.description: Tell us which participant you are to let us customize how the information is displayed.
ActiveUserModal.nobody: I don’t want to select anyone
ActiveUserModal.footer: This setting can be changed later in the group settings.

Debts.title: Debts
Debts.description: Who owes whom, split by currency.
Debts.noPending: There are no pending simplified debts.

Expenses.noEntriesYet: There are no entries in this group yet.

Groups.createPageDescription: Create a group from scratch and start organizing expenses with your account.
Groups.createErrorDescription: An error occurred while creating the group.

SignIn.title: Sign in to view your groups
SignIn.description: NexoGastos now uses account-based access. Sign in to open your groups and continue where you left off.

Groups.groupsHeroDescription: Open your groups, create a new one, and manage everything from your account.

NoRecent.description: You do not have any groups in your account yet.
NoRecent.orAsk: or ask to be added to a group with your account so it appears here.

RecentRemovedToast.title: Group has been removed
RecentRemovedToast.description: The group was removed from your recent groups list.

AddByURL.title: Add a group by URL
AddByURL.description: If a group was shared with you, you can paste its URL here to add it to your list.
AddByURL.error: Oops, we are not able to find the group from the URL you provided…

NameField.label: Group name
NameField.description: Enter a name for your group.

InformationField.label: Group information
InformationField.placeholder: What information is relevant to group participants?

CurrencyField.label: Currency symbol
CurrencyField.description: We’ll use it to display amounts.

CurrencyCodeField.label: Default currency
CurrencyCodeField.createDescription: Used as the default currency when creating new expenses.
CurrencyCodeField.editDescription: This only sets the group's default currency. It does not convert existing expenses or merge balances across different currencies.

Participants.title: Participants
Participants.description: Enter the name for each participant.
Participants.protectedParticipant: This participant is part of expenses, and can not be removed.

Settings.title: Local settings
Settings.description: These settings are set per-device, and are used to customize your experience.

ActiveUserField.label: Active user
ActiveUserField.description: User used as default for paying expenses.

TitleField.label: Income title
TitleField.description: Enter a description for the income.

DateField.label: Income date
DateField.description: Enter the date the income was received.

currencyField.label: Currency of income
currencyField.description: The currency in which the income was received.

paidByField.label: Received by
paidByField.description: Select the participant who received the income.

paidFor.title: Received for
paidFor.description: Select who the income was received for.

Income.splitModeDescription: Select how to split the income.
Income.attachDescription: See and attach receipts to the income.

TitleField.label: Expense title
TitleField.description: Enter a description for the expense.

DateField.label: Expense date
DateField.description: Enter the date the expense was paid.

currencyField.label: Currency of expense
currencyField.description: The currency in which the expense was paid.

paidByField.label: Paid by
paidByField.description: Select the participant who paid the expense.

recurrenceRule.label: Expense Recurrence
recurrenceRule.description: Select how often the expense should repeat.

paidFor.title: Paid for
paidFor.description: Select who the expense was paid for.

Expense.splitModeDescription: Select how to split the expense.
Expense.attachDescription: See and attach receipts to the expense.

ExpenseForm.conversionUnavailable: To set a different currency per expense and convert amounts, select a non-custom currency for the group.

conversionRateState.error: Oops, we could not get the most recent rates.
conversionRateState.currencyNotFound: Oops, Frankfurter does not have the rate for this currency at this day.
conversionRateState.noDate: Enter the expense date to get a conversion rate.

DeletePopup.label: Delete
DeletePopup.title: Delete this expense?
DeletePopup.description: Do you really want to delete this expense? This action is irreversible.

mobile.step1Description: Define the concept, date, currency, and who made the payment.
mobile.reviewBeforeSave: Review the final content and save the entry.
mobile.tapToInclude: Tap to include in the split

TooBigToast.title: The file is too big
TooBigToast.description: The maximum file size you can upload is {maxSize}. Yours is {size}.

ErrorToast.title: Error while uploading document
ErrorToast.description: Something wrong happened when uploading the document. Please retry later or select a different file.

Dialog.title: Create from receipt
Dialog.description: Extract the expense information from a receipt photo.
Dialog.body: Upload the photo of a receipt, and we’ll scan it to extract the expense information if we can.
Dialog.editNext: You’ll be able to edit the expense information next.

TooBigToast.title: The file is too big
TooBigToast.description: The maximum file size you can upload is {maxSize}. Yours is {size}.

ErrorToast.title: Error while uploading document
ErrorToast.description: Something wrong happened when uploading the document. Please retry later or select a different file.

Balances.title: Balances
Balances.description: This is the amount that each participant paid or was paid for.
Balances.emptyDescription: All participants are up to date across every currency.

Reimbursements.noPendingDebtsDescription: There are no pending debts to settle in this group.

paymentRegistered.title: Payment recorded
paymentRegistered.description: The debt was marked as paid.

Reimbursements.title: Suggested reimbursements
Reimbursements.description: Here are suggestions for optimized reimbursements between participants.
Reimbursements.noImbursements: It looks like your group doesn’t need any reimbursement 😁

Totals.title: Totals
Totals.description: Spending summary of the entire group.

Activity.title: Activity
Activity.description: Overview of all activity in this group.
Activity.noActivity: There is not yet any activity in your group.

Information.title: Information
Information.description: Use this place to add any information that can be relevant to the group participants.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.summaryDescription: Manage participants, currency, access, and exports.
Settings.hubDescription: Choose a section and manage the group without loading everything on one screen.
Settings.quickActionsDescription: Jump to the most common group tasks without going through long forms.
Settings.participantsAndAccessShort: List, invites, and accounts with access.
Settings.participantsAndAccessDescription: Manage group participants and which accounts are linked to each one.
Settings.participantEditDescription: Change the participant name without leaving settings.
Settings.participantAssignAccessDescription: Link an existing account by email to {participant}.
Settings.editGroupDescription: Name, participants, currency, and general information.
Settings.viewBalancesDescription: Review settlements and pending group payments.
Settings.shareAndExportDescription: Manage group access and export its data without mixing in general editing.
Settings.accessManagementDescription: Share the link with people who already have access and manage who can enter the group.
Settings.shareLinkDescription: The link can open the group only for accounts that already have linked access.
Settings.inviteOnboardingDescription: Your group is ready. You can now grant access to other accounts from here.
Settings.inviteOnboardingBody: Add each person's email and assign them to an available participant in the group.
Settings.memberAccessDescription: Link by email a person who has already signed in to NexoGastos and assign them to an available participant in the group.
Settings.memberAccessNoParticipants: All participants are already linked to an account.
Settings.memberAddedDescription: {email} can now access the group as {participant}.
Settings.memberAddErrorDescription: An error occurred while linking the account.
Settings.linkedMembersDescription: These accounts already have access to the group and are linked to a participant.
Settings.linkedMembersEmpty: There are no other linked accounts in this group yet.
Settings.memberRemoveErrorDescription: An error occurred while deleting the membership.
Settings.exportSectionDescription: Download the group records in the format you need.
Settings.exportInfoDescription: JSON and CSV export the group expenses with their current information.
Settings.securityDescription: Group access is now controlled through account membership.
Settings.dangerZoneDescription: Deleting the group removes expenses, balances, and activity.
Settings.linkAccessDescription1: With an active password, sharing only the URL is not enough to access the group.
Settings.linkAccessDescription2: If you change it, anyone who already entered will need to validate again.
Settings.deleteDialogDescription: Participants, expenses, debts, and activity will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
Settings.deleteConfirmCheckbox: I understand this deletion is permanent.
Settings.deleteConfirmLabel: Type the group name to confirm:
Settings.editPageDescription: Manage participants, default currency, and access security.

Summary.title: Summary
Summary.description: General group status and main entry points.
Summary.accessDescription: Accounts with active membership in this group.
Summary.pendingAccessDescription: They are not linked to an account yet. You can add them from settings.
Summary.quickActionsDescription: Jump into the group based on what you need to do next.
Summary.participantLinksDescription: Here you can see which participants are already linked to a registered account.
Summary.settingsDescription: Edit participants, currency, access security, and exports.
Summary.noPendingDescription: When debts appear between participants, you will see them summarized here by person and currency.

Layout.footerDescription: Shared expense management with a mobile-first approach.

ExpenseFlow.description: Complete the details and save the transaction.

Unlock.title: Protected group
Unlock.errorDescription: An error occurred while validating the password.

Share.title: Share
Share.description: Share the group URL with people who already have access linked to their account.
Share.warningHelp: The link alone does not grant access. If someone is not yet a member, add them first.

SchemaErrors.duplicateParticipantName: A participant with this name already exists.
SchemaErrors.ratePositive: Exchange rate must be greater than 0.
SchemaErrors.paidByRequired: Select who paid for this expense.
SchemaErrors.paidForMin1: Select at least one participant in "Paid for".
SchemaErrors.noZeroShares: All shares must be greater than 0.
SchemaErrors.amountSum: The participant amount split must match the total amount.
SchemaErrors.percentageSum: The percentage split must add up to exactly 100%.

name.min2: Group name must be at least 2 characters.
name.max50: Group name must be 50 characters or fewer.

participants_items_name.min2: Participant name must be at least 2 characters.
participants_items_name.max50: Participant name must be 50 characters or fewer.
participants_items_name.duplicateParticipantName: Another participant already has this name.

title.titleRequired: Enter an expense title to continue.
title.min2: Expense title must be at least 2 characters.
title.max50: Expense title must be 50 characters or fewer.

amount.amountNotZero: Expense amount must be different from 0.

paidBy.paidByRequired: Select who paid for this expense.

paidFor.paidForMin1: Select at least one person in "Paid for".
paidFor.amountSum: Split-by-amount must match the total expense amount.
paidFor.percentageSum: Split-by-percentage must add up to exactly 100%.

paidFor_items_shares.noZeroShares: All shares must be greater than 0.

conversionRate.ratePositive: Exchange rate must be greater than 0.
